executives.name: Stephen G. Roman
executives.background: Mr. Roman is an entrepreneur who has successfully identified, financed, developed, and operated several mining and oil and gas projects. He was formerly the Chairman, President and CEO of Gold Eagle Mines Ltd. and Harte Gold Corp.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Rein A. Lehari
executives.background: Mr. Lehari is a Chartered Professional Accountant and was formerly a partner with PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Ronald S. Halas
executives.background: Mr. Halas is a Professional Engineer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at IAMGOLD, Kinross Gold, and Vale.

executives.name: Fergus P. Kerr
executives.background: Mr. Kerr is a Professional Engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in underground mining operations.

executives.name: Bob J. Partridge
executives.background: Mr. Partridge is a Professional Geoscientist with over 35 years of experience in mineral exploration and development.

executives.name: Tim Campbell
executives.background: Mr. Campbell has over 25 years of experience in the mining sector, focusing on corporate development, regulatory compliance, and investor relations.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, ESG and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Stephen G. Roman
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, President and CEO of Global Atomic Corporation. Extensive experience in the resource sector.

board_of_directors.name: Tracey Arlaud
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Arlaud is a mining engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the CEO of I-80 Gold Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Asher G.Z. Levitsky
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Levitsky is a lawyer with over 40 years of experience in corporate and securities law. He is a partner at Ellenoff Grossman & Schole LLP.

board_of_directors.name: Richard J.S. Adams
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Adams has over 40 years of experience in the financial services industry, specializing in investment banking and corporate finance.

board_of_directors.name: Derek C. Rance
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Rance is a Professional Engineer and experienced mining executive. He was formerly the President and CEO of Iron Ore Company of Canada.
